message:
fix(onboard): release lock when jq fails in progress functions

Fixed bug in mark_completed() and set_current() where the file lock
was not released when jq failed to transform the progress JSON. This
could cause a deadlock if another process tried to acquire the lock
within the 5-second timeout.

Added proper lock release and return in the jq failure code paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -271,6 +271,8 @@ mark_completed() {
             }
         else
             rm -f -- "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
+            exec {lock_fd}>&- 2>/dev/null || true
+            return 0
         fi
 
         # Release lock
@@ -320,6 +322,8 @@ set_current() {
             }
         else
             rm -f -- "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
+            exec {lock_fd}>&- 2>/dev/null || true
+            return 0
         fi
 
         # Release lock
